properties.query:
SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    zone_id,
    crop_batch_id,
    crop_type,
    lifecycle_stage,
    CAST(age_days AS FLOAT) AS age_days,
    CAST(health_score AS FLOAT) AS health_score,
    CAST(environmental_stress_index AS FLOAT) AS environmental_stress_index,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [CropLifecycleKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'CropLifecycleEvent'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    zone_id,
    crop_batch_id,
    crop_type,
    lifecycle_stage,
    CAST(age_days AS FLOAT) AS age_days,
    CAST(health_score AS FLOAT) AS health_score,
    CAST(growth_rate AS FLOAT) AS growth_rate,
    CAST(biomass_grams AS FLOAT) AS biomass_grams,
    CAST(water_consumption_liters AS FLOAT) AS water_consumption_liters,
    CAST(nutrient_consumption_grams AS FLOAT) AS nutrient_consumption_grams,
    CAST(environmental_stress_index AS FLOAT) AS environmental_stress_index,
    CAST(ambient_temperature_celsius AS FLOAT) AS ambient_temperature_celsius,
    CAST(ambient_humidity_percent AS FLOAT) AS ambient_humidity_percent,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [CropTelemetryKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'crop'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    sensor_type,
    CAST(sensor_value AS FLOAT) AS sensor_value,
    unit,
    sensor_status,
    weather,
    CAST(is_daytime AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS is_daytime,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [EnvironmentalKQLTarget]
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'environmental'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    zone_id,
    equipment_id,
    equipment_type,
    operating_status,
    health,
    current_load,
    failure_probability,
    runtime_hours,
    vibration_vps,
    operating_temperature_c,
    power_consumption_kw,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [EquipmentKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'equipment'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    CAST(overall_health AS FLOAT) AS overall_health,
    CAST(active_critical_alerts AS BIGINT) AS active_critical_alerts,
    CAST(power_draw_kw AS FLOAT) AS power_draw_kw,
    CAST(water_circulation_lph AS FLOAT) AS water_circulation_lph,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [FacilityKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'FacilityEvent'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    zone_id,
    CAST(irrigation_active AS BIT) AS irrigation_active,
    CAST(flow_rate_liters_per_minute AS FLOAT) AS flow_rate_liters_per_minute,
    CAST(pressure_kpa AS FLOAT) AS pressure_kpa,
    CAST(irrigation_duration_seconds AS BIGINT) AS irrigation_duration_seconds,
    CAST(water_delivered_liters AS FLOAT) AS water_delivered_liters,
    CAST(nutrient_solution_delivered_liters AS FLOAT) AS nutrient_solution_delivered_liters,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [IrrigationKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'irrigation.telemetry'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    zone_id,
    CAST(lighting_enabled AS BIT) AS lighting_enabled,
    CAST(lighting_intensity_percent AS FLOAT) AS lighting_intensity_percent,
    CAST(photoperiod_hours AS FLOAT) AS photoperiod_hours,
    CAST(daily_light_integral AS FLOAT) AS daily_light_integral,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [LightingKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'lighting.telemetry'

SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_type,
    facility_id,
    zone_id,
    equipment_id,
    maintenance_type,
    maintenance_status,
    technician_notes,
    CAST(health_restored AS FLOAT) AS health_restored,
    timestamp,
    schema_version
INTO [MaintenanceKQLTarget] 
FROM [FarmingTelemetryEventstream-stream]
WHERE event_type = 'maintenance.event'
